text.title: LangChain and LangGraph: Building Production AI Agents — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workflow have loops, retries, or human-approval steps?

branch.conclusion: Router-node LangGraph. classifier routes to one of N agents.
Supervisor LangGraph. Supervisor delegates to sub-agents; explicit routing.
Use LCEL. prompt | model | parser pipeline.

example.p: Support triage with classifier + tool agent + human approval → has interrupts → 2 agents → router-node → LangGraph with postgres checkpointer.
